title: N2 crash: Young Emma recovering well
description: SEDGEFIELD NEWS - There is hope on the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - There is hope on the horizon for 11-year-old Emma Snyman, who was critically injured in a devastating car crash on the N2 near Sedgefield on 26 May.","html":"SEDGEFIELD NEWS - There is hope on the horizon for 11-year-old Emma Snyman, who was critically injured in a devastating car crash on the N2 near Sedgefield on 26 May."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"At the time of the accident Emma was urgently transferred between three hospitals before being airlifted to Red Cross Children's Hospital in Cape Town, where she received life-saving care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After months of intensive medical care and rehabilitation, Emma is now making remarkable progress in her recovery.","html":"After months of intensive medical care and rehabilitation, Emma is now making remarkable progress in her recovery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to a close family friend, Werner Bronkhorst, there is a good chance that Emma may regain full mobility in her neck. Her jaw has also healed significantly, to the point where she is now able to start chewing food again.","html":"According to a close family friend, Werner Bronkhorst, there is a good chance that Emma may regain full mobility in her neck. Her jaw has also healed significantly, to the point where she is now able to start chewing food again."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Additionally, her clavicle and brain injuries have shown strong recovery.","html":"Additionally, her clavicle and brain injuries have shown strong recovery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""She's talking well and, noticeably, she now has more self-confidence."","html":""She's talking well and, noticeably, she now has more self-confidence.""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, he noted that the left side of her face remains damaged. "We don't yet know if plastic surgery will be able to repair it over time," he added.","html":"However, he noted that the left side of her face remains damaged. "We don't yet know if plastic surgery will be able to repair it over time," he added."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A BackaBuddy fundraising campaign set up to assist the family has raised about R380 000, of which the family got R350 000 after fees paid to BackaBuddy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":""On behalf of the Snyman family, who do not have medical aid, we would like to thank everyone who contributed, no matter how small the donation. These funds have been like manna from heaven. It's going to be a long road to recovery," Bronkhorst said.","html":""On behalf of the Snyman family, who do not have medical aid, we would like to thank everyone who contributed, no matter how small the donation. These funds have been like manna from heaven. It's going to be a long road to recovery," Bronkhorst said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Emma has now returned to Seabridge School in Sedgefield, but is only attending for select subjects and just two hours a day as she continues to regain her strength.","html":"Emma has now returned to Seabridge School in Sedgefield, but is only attending for select subjects and just two hours a day as she continues to regain her strength."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["BackaBuddy campaign launched for young girl critically injured in Sedgefield crash | Knysna-Plett Herald","N2 traffic disrupted following major accident near Sedgefield Bridge","Police investigate reckless driving after Sedgefield crash"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
